latin: Amor patris mei venenum est. nos omnes vult vincere sed neminem vincere sinit. ludus eius nos frangit. et tamen — eius approbationem quaerimus.

questions.prompt: How is the father's love described?
What paradox do the children face?
questions.target: They seek approval from the man who breaks them
choices: They want to leave but stay
They seek approval from the man who breaks them
They love each other but compete

translation: My father's love is poison. He wants us all to win but allows no one to succeed. His game breaks us. And yet — we seek his approval.
